title: Syrian-Style Porcini Pilaf
description: A flavorful Syrian-inspired pilaf dish made with porcini mushrooms, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dried porcini mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked pilaf rice, cumin, and paprika. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
